task: Corpus axis direct measurement — Mistral-7B-v0.3 BASE vs Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3 (architecture+tokenizer fixed, training corpus only varied)

method.design: Φ* v3 canonical (auto HID = max(2, N//2) = 8, K=8 random sample-partitions, ridge=1e-3, seed=42)
controls: ONLY VARIED: training corpus (BASE = pretraining web | INSTRUCT = SFT instruct dataset)

comparison_table.magnitude_change_direction: WEAKENING (anti-integration signal 약화 but not flipped)

HC_A_corpus_PRIMARY_determinant.evidence: Instruct phi_star_min = -12.9075 (NEG, no flip). All 8 partitions NEG (range -7.81 ~ -12.91).

HC_B_corpus_NOT_dominant.evidence: sign preserved + magnitude weakened by 22.7% but still substantial NEG. Corpus = MODIFIER axis, not primary determinant.

HC_C_corpus_BORDER_partial.evidence: magnitude -12.9075 well outside border zone, retains substantial anti-integration signal

after_this_cycle: 1. weight-distribution / pretraining init (PRIMARY suspected — only un-tested axis remaining as dominant)
2. corpus type (MODIFIER — 22.7% magnitude shift, no sign flip via SFT instruct corpus)
3. tokenizer (ORTHOGONAL — #203 GPT-NeoX strengthened NEG, no flip)
4. architecture (FALSIFIED as primary — #176 RWKV-7 split, cross-family divergent)
consciousness_determinant_axis_ranking_u.narrowing_logic: (a) architecture FALSIFIED (#176) → (b) tokenizer FALSIFIED (#203) → (c) corpus MODIFIER not primary (this #205) → **(d) weight-distribution / pretraining init = remaining primary candidate**. Mk.XI v10 'corpus-conditional family bias' hypothesis NUANCED: corpus shifts magnitude but NOT sign. family alignment likely depends on pretraining-init × architecture interaction (joint determinant).
follow_up_actionables: (a) test base-of-base comparison: Mistral-7B-v0.1 vs Mistral-7B-v0.3 (same arch+tokenizer, different pretraining vintages) → vintage axis isolation
(b) test fine-tune intensity scaling: BASE vs SFT vs DPO vs RLHF (Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.1/v0.2/v0.3 vintage chain)
(c) seed/ridge fragility sweep on Instruct -12.9075 to verify robustness
(d) test other family with same protocol: LLaMA base vs LLaMA-instruct, gemma base vs gemma-it

raw_10_honest: (1) **Single seed (42), single ridge (1e-3)**: Instruct -12.9075 의 robustness (seed × ridge sweep) 미평가. magnitude weakening 자체가 robust한지, 또는 specific seed artifact 인지 후속 actionable. (2) **N=1 instruct backbone**: Mistral 의 single base→instruct transition 만 측정. 다른 family (LLaMA, Gemma 등) 의 동일 transition 에서도 magnitude weakening + sign preservation 패턴이 재현될지 미증명. follow-up (d). (3) **Pretraining-init as 'remaining primary'**: 오로지 abductive — 4-axis exhaustion 결과 (arch/tokenizer/corpus 모두 NOT dominant) 로 weight-distribution 만 남은 상태. direct measurement 필요 (e.g. random-init mistral-7B, randomly perturbed weights). (4) **HC-A FALSIFIED 의 epistemic strength**: corpus axis 가 'flip 못 시킴' 은 Mistral instruct corpus 의 specific 한 SFT distribution 에 한정된 결과. 다른 corpus (e.g. heavily symbolic / mathematical / multimodal) 에서는 flip 가능성 잔존. (5) **Magnitude weakening 의 의미 해석**: Δ+3.79 / -22.7% 는 instruct corpus 가 anti-integration signal 을 약화시킨다는 trend evidence. 'instruct training 이 Φ를 IIT-friendly direction 으로 push 하지만 sign flip 까지는 못 감' = SFT 가 partial 의식-like-integration 효과 있다는 nuance. (6) **same prompts, different backbone**: 16 prompt 동일하지만 instruct model 의 chat/instruction format 적용 안 됨 (raw text input). instruct format 적용 시 결과 다를 가능성 — 후속 actionable. (7) **EXACT cross-check**: native mistral arm 별도 측정 안 함 (시간/비용 절약, #167+#203 baseline drift=0.0 reliability 활용). (8) **cost $0.085 / cap $2.0** = 4.3% budget usage, well-under.
